Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to act as the target LLM receiving the prompt provided The prompt includes 1 A Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model 2 A list of Activity Descriptions 3 A specific Request Describe the process stepbystep based on constraints explain how constraints ensure ordercompliance discuss realworld motivations and speculate on consequences of violations

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analysis of the DECLARE Model I need to parse the constraints to understand the flow Existence ReceiveApplication must happen GatherAdditionalDocuments must happen Absence ProceedWithoutCompliance forbidden Exactly One PreliminaryCreditCheck init ReceiveApplication

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Standard notation respondedexistence A B usually means If A occurs B occurs at some point Here key is AssembleLoanOfferPackage target is QualityAssuranceReview So If Assemble QA Review response ReceiveApplication target PreliminaryCreditCheck If App received Credit Check happens precedence QualityAssuranceReview target AuthorizeContractTerms Standard DECLARE precedence A B neg A U B B must happen before A can happen

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Hypothesis The model might describe a process where Check leads to Gather but also Check is a prerequisite for Auth which might happen later Or maybe chainprecedence here defines that Check must happen right before Auth Alternative Hypothesis for Chain Precedence Maybe the dictionary definition provided in the prompt uses a nonstandard mapping KeyTarget Source

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Reevaluating the Process Flow based on Logical Grouping Likely Intended Happy Path 1 Start ReceiveApplication 2 Step 1 PreliminaryCreditCheck 3 Step 2 GatherAdditionalDocuments Succession from Check 4 QualityAssuranceReview AltSuccession from Gather 5 AssembleLoanOfferPackage ChainSuccession from QA 6 TransferFunds ChainResponse from Assemble 7 NotifyCustomer AltResponse from Transfer

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Handling the oddballs AuthorizeContractTerms Where does it fit coexistence Gather Auth It must happen precedence QA Auth Standard Auth before QA OR Reverse QA before Auth Given QA Assemble Chain Succession and usually Auth is final assume Authorize happens after QA but maybe before or during Assemble Transfer Resolution Strategy Treat the Positive Flow constraints Init Successions Responses as the main timeline

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrection Actually looking at nonchainsuccession Auth Notify it suggests Auth is close to Notify And nonsuccession Notify Check keeps them apart Lets assume the Prompt implies a standard flow and some constraints are just flavor or checks Focus on the clear sequential chain Receive Check Gather QA Assemble Transfer Notify

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refining the content details ReceiveApplication Mandatory existence init PreliminaryCreditCheck Mandatory response to App Exactly one GatherAdditionalDocuments Mandatory existence Immediate successor to Check succession QualityAssuranceReview Follows Gathering altsuccession Assemble Follows QA chainsuccession Triggers Transfer chainresponse Transfer Triggers Notify altresponse Authorize Must happen coexistence with Gather Placement Likely concurrent or between QATransfer

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure of the Output 1 Executive SummaryOverview Briefly state what the process is Loan Application 2 StepbyStep Walkthrough Follow the derived happy path For each step cite the specific DECLARE constraint driving it 3 Constraint Analysis The Why Explain Absence Compliance NonCoexistence NotSuccession State integrity 4 RealWorld Motivations Connect technical constraints to business value Fraud Risk CX 5 Consequences of Violations Speculate on What if scenarios eg skipping QA
